'''Pendarran's Revenge''' was an armed organization formed by [[Kolor Delan]] that fought against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
[[File:Kolor_Delan.png|thumb|left|150px|[[Kolor Delan]], founder and leader of Pendarran's Revenge.]]
The group was based on [[Shalm]] and named after the [[Pendarran Warriors]], who were led by Kolor's father, [[Gendal Delan]]. The Penderran Warriors fought with the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Knights]] and the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], but were exterminated in the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]].<ref name="Wanted by Cracken" />

The Pendarran's Revenge group occasionally aided the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], however, after the Empire's [[Battle of Endor/Legends|defeat]] at [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], Kolor became hostile to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was unknown if Kolor held a grudge against someone in the government, or if someone hired Pendarran's Revenge to act against the fledgling democracy.<ref name="Wanted by Cracken" />
